text:
1. Calculate the time difference: US/Hawaii is UTC - 10, Europe/Athens is UTC + 2, so the time difference is 12 hours.
2. Add the time difference to the given time: 08:00 + 12:00 = 20:00.
3. Since the time is still on the same day (no date change), the result is 20:00 on March 21, 1784.
FINAL_ANSWER: 20:00
